name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 16 May 2023
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes the launch of a new Journey template."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"NEW FEATURE","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"New Journey Template – Abandoned Cart Journey Template","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Working towards our aim of simplifying the automation setups, we launched our second Journey template – "},{"text":"Abandoned Cart Journey Template","bold":true},{"text":". This pre-designed template enables you to set up your abandoned cart Journey in two quick steps."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about setting up Abandoned Cart emails, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Sending-Abandoned-Cart-Emails-to-Your-Neto-Contacts","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Sending Abandoned Cart Emails to Your Neto Contacts","bold":true}]},{"text":". And to learn about Abandoned Cart Journey Template, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Abandoned-Cart-Journey-Template","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Abandoned Cart Journey Template","bold":true}]},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In step 1, you will configure the Journey by entering or selecting the name, end date, activation status at the time of creation, and retrigger preference."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AbandonedCartJourneyStep1.0685g00000EhcSWAAZ.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AbandonedCartJourneyStep1.0685g00000EhcSWAAZ.jpg","name":"Abandoned Cart Journey Step 1","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1595,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In step 2, you will select the web store connection that you want to use as the trigger source and the from name and content for emails that will be sent. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AbandonedCartJourneyTemplate2.0685g00000EhcVrAAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AbandonedCartJourneyTemplate2.0685g00000EhcVrAAJ.png","name":"Abandoned Cart Journey Template 2","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1310,"width":2560}}]}]
